common.headerBrandSubtitle: أدوات النص والتطوير وتحسين محركات البحث
common.toolEditorCopy: Paste the content, run the action, and copy the result. Counts update in real time.
common.toolHowToUseCopy: Follow the steps below to use {tool}.
common.toolStepPaste: Paste the text in the editor above
common.toolStepCopy: Copy the result with the 📋 button
common.toolExampleCopy: See what the result looks like after conversion.
common.faqA1: Yes. {tool} is completely free and can be used in the browser without registration. Open the page, paste your text, and convert it.
common.faqQ2: Do I need to sign up or install anything to use {toolLower}?
common.faqA2: No. {toolLower} runs directly in the browser with no registration, download, or software installation required.
common.faqQ3: Is the text I type sent to external servers?
common.faqA3: We do not store typed content. The transformation happens in your browser without sending data to external servers.
common.faqA4: Yes. The page is responsive and works on smaller screens, tablets, and smartphones. You can use {toolLower} from any device.
common.faqQ5: How is {toolLower} different from similar tools?
common.faqA5: {tool} was built for simplicity, privacy, and technical SEO. Each page includes a description, example, FAQ, and structured data.
common.articleIntro: When someone searches for "{title}", they usually need a practical, fast, and reliable solution. This guide explains the concept, shows examples, and highlights precautions for working with text, data, and web content with less rework.
common.articleP1: Text can come from editors, spreadsheets, PDFs, legacy systems, APIs, databases, or forms. Each source may include extra spaces, line breaks, accents, encodings, or invisible characters.
common.articleP2: Start with a small sample. Test the transformation, verify that the result keeps the essential information, and only then apply it to a larger volume.
common.articleP3: For SEO, clear titles, readable slugs, concise meta descriptions, and structured data help search engines understand the page. Automation speeds repetitive work, but human review still matters.
common.articleP4: For development, well-formatted data reduces errors. Indented JSON, organized XML, decoded Base64, properly encoded URLs, and checked timestamps make debugging faster.
common.articleP5: Avoid pasting tokens, passwords, private keys, personal data, or confidential information. For sensitive content, use dummy examples or a controlled internal environment.
common.articleP6: A recommended workflow is to paste the text, apply the transformation, validate the result, copy it to the final destination, and keep an original version in case you need to revert.
common.articleP7: Common mistakes include trusting only visual appearance, ignoring broken accents, removing meaningful symbols, publishing JSON without validation, and overusing uppercase text.
common.articleP8: Use short examples to test accents, casing, blank lines, nested objects, and headers before applying the transformation to larger content.
common.articleP9: On ConvertTextEasy, you can pair this article with the {tool} tool. It includes an editor, example, FAQ, and structured data for easier use and discovery.
common.articleP10: Document internal standards for slugs, titles, metadata, accents, encoding, and validation. Clear rules improve consistency across the site or product.
common.articleRelatedCopy: Use {tool} to apply this concept in a few clicks.

404.title: Page not found
404.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have moved.
sections: What you can do
Go back to the home page, visit the blog, or open one of the available tools.

about.title: About ConvertTextEasy
about.desc: A free platform with more than 30 online tools to transform text, validate technical data, and optimize content for SEO.
sections: What we do
We simplify text editing and standardization with fast, intuitive tools available from any device.
Main features
Text conversion, JSON/XML/CSV formatting, Base64 and URL encoding, slug generation, UUIDs, hashes, timestamps, Morse code, counters, accent removal, and SEO meta tags.
Privacy and technology
Most transformations run in your browser, reducing latency and avoiding unnecessary data transfer.
Why use it
Fast, simple, accessible, and built for repeated everyday text workflows.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.desc: Send a message, suggestion, or question. Your feedback helps improve the tools for everyone.
sections: Contact form
Fill in the fields and send your message.
Support
We are available to help with questions about using the tools.
Other pages
Return to the home page or explore other tools.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.desc: Learn how ConvertTextEasy handles privacy, cookies, local processing, and user data.
sections: Overview
ConvertTextEasy is designed to process text transformations in the browser whenever possible.
Cookies and ads
We may use cookies to improve the experience and display relevant ads.
Your rights
You can contact us to ask questions about privacy or data handling.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.desc: Read the terms for using ConvertTextEasy tools and content.
sections: Use of the service
The tools are provided for practical text, development, and SEO tasks.
User responsibility
Review transformed content before using it in professional, legal, or sensitive contexts.
Changes
These terms may be updated as the service evolves.
